docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY DREW, HOWARD DE MELLO, VANNESSA AS TO DEFENDANT LI, STEPHANIE LI, YUAN MING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-09-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE WAS $50.00 SERVED APR-10-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LI, YUAN MING

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE REMARKS:NO ANSWER AT THE TIME OF SERVICE. THIS WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE THE RESPONDENT WAS NOT FOUND. ATTEMOTS MADE TO NO AVAIL. NO RESPONSE LEFT AT THE ADDRESS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF DREW, HOWARD DE MELLO, VANNESSA AS TO DEFENDANT LI, STEPHANIE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-09-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-09-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE TRUE. PLAINTIFF HOWARD DREW IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF VANNESSSA DE MELLO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT STEPHANIE LI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT YUAND MING LI IS PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT YUAN MING LI IS ON FILE. DEFENDANT STEPHANIE LI WAIVES SERVICE. PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOHN LI; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-09-2025 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DREW, HOWARD DE MELLO, VANNESSA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LI, STEPHANIE LI, YUAN MING $750.00 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $875.00, DEFENDANT YUAN MING LI DISMISSED; NAMED IN ERROR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF DE MELLO, VANNESSA
